name: clay-premium
description: High-Fidelity Claymorphism — soft matte silicone surfaces, candy-store colors, 4-layer shadow stacks, and bouncy micro-interactions. Zero sharp corners. Buttons squish. Cards float.
author: getdrip
signature_traits: 4-layer shadow stacks on every convex surface
Minimum rounded-[20px] on all elements — never sharp corners
Inputs recessed (inset shadow), buttons convex (outward shadow)
3-4 animated background blobs on every page
Lavender canvas #F4F1FA — never white or gray
Nunito Black headings + DM Sans body
Hover lift -translate-y-1 minimum on all interactive elements
